name: @stackra/query
purpose: Store-backed data fetching — TanStack Query cache + fetcher registry, DI-integrated, composable with @stackra/state stores for reactive reads.
capabilities: TanStack Query core wired into the DI container
State-store composition for cross-app reactive reads
React bindings + actions subpath for @Query dispatch
Testing subpath with in-memory query client
when_to_use: Reading server data with cache-first UX, optimistic mutations, and realtime-driven invalidation.
when_not_to_use: For local ephemeral state use @stackra/state; for direct HTTP without caching use @stackra/http.
